remarks:
Air Liquide Medical Systems Pvt. Ltd. based in Chennai trades in ventilators imported from France as well as manufactures ventilators indigenously for intensive care.   
 
We have over 40 years of service to health professionals and patients. We have a large sales and service support network across the country with over 4000 installations. Some of our prime customers include AIIMS Delhi, where we have sold over 500 ventilators. 
 
We value your account, and we would like to support you very much during the current pandemic of Coronavirus ( COVID-19 ). 
However we would like to highlight that at present our Assembly line is overloaded and we are booked with existing rate contract orders from various Government Hospitals & Procurement pan-India 
In this prevailing situation where section 144 has been imposed, both by the Central & State Governments, there is a disruption of Supply Chain & Transportation for the past 2 months- Raw material, accessories and spare parts are not readily available to manufacture and deliver. Additionally, some of the raw materials used to manufacture ventilators were being imported from France, Italy, China, etc. 
In view of the above constraints, we propose the following delivery schedule:
a)    OEM ICU Ventilators tentative delivery schedule will be 10-12 weeks
b)    Imported Ventilators tentative delivery schedule will be 12-16 weeks 
Payment terms: 100% payment against Order / against readiness of material

remarks:
Background:
Coronavirus disease (COVID-19) is an infectious disease caused by a newly discovered coronavirus -
Novel corona virus, first recognized in Wuhan, China, in December 2019. Most of the people infected
with the novel corona virus will experience mild to moderate respiratory illness and recover without
requiring special treatment just like any other flu. Approximately 14% develop severe disease that
requires hospitalization and 5% of the infected people especially elderly, with underlying cardiovascular
disease, diabetes, chronic respiratory disease, and cancer are more likely to develop serious illness and
can be complicated with acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS). These patients require immediate
intensive care and mechanical ventilation. The patients with emergency signs like obstructed or absent
breathing, severe respiratory distress, central cyanosis, shock, coma, or convulsions warrant an
immediate airway management and oxygen therapy to target SpO2 ≥ 94% until the patient is stabilised.
The highest chance of droplet dispersion from COVID-19 patients, which is a potent source for disease
transmission to healthcare providers, limited number of healthcare providers available in the present
circumstances, and the lack of ventilatory support system in health care setups, made us to think of a
machine driven Ambu bag based ventilator.
VENT-01 is a fully automated mechanical ventilator
which works on AC/DC voltage, with a battery
backup as well. The machine is provided with a hand
held emergency switches will help the
patients/medical staffs to stop the machines during
emergency situations. The machine allows to
program the breath cycles per minute (RR) and the
amount of air moved in and out of lungs (tidal
volume- Tv) per breath. Although this is not a
replacement for the positive pressure ventilator used
in usual ICU set up, this simple portable device will
be an alternate with following advantages:
Advantages
1) it reduce the requirement of medical staff to assist patient for ventilation
2) can adjust the amount of air inhaled and rate of cycle as well
3) It is a good option in the a) primary health care set up and primary isolation wards
4) while transporting patients to ICU from Emergency medicine dept and also to tertiary care hospitals
5) mass production with relatively low cost which could benefit the most.
6)Easily transportable Battery Back available for using remote areas
